apis.name: CandidateStadiumExperienceAPI
apis.description: Candidate API for stadium connectivity packages, premium event passes, temporary 5G capacity reservations, and venue partner activation.

apis.name: CandidateIoTFleetTelemetryAPI
apis.description: Candidate API for enterprise fleet device telemetry, SIM status, vehicle heartbeat checks, and IoT monetization packages.

apis.name: CandidateDroneInspectionEventsAPI
apis.description: Candidate event API for drone-based tower inspection events, image-processing outcomes, field dispatch triggers, and maintenance risk signals.

apis.name: CandidateEdgeCacheControlAPI
apis.description: Candidate API for edge-cache invalidation, partner content pre-warming, CDN policy selection, and traffic steering at regional edge sites.

apis.name: CandidateRoamingSponsorAPI-MissingMonetization
apis.description: Negative pipeline scenario: candidate API intentionally misses mandatory monetization metadata and should be rejected before APIM import.

apis.name: CandidateDeviceCertificationAPI-MissingHealthCheck
apis.description: Negative pipeline scenario: candidate API intentionally misses health-check metadata and operation IDs.

apis.name: CandidateFieldWorkOrderSOAPAPI
apis.description: Candidate SOAP pass-through API for a legacy field-work-order backend. This must be imported from WSDL as implementationType=SOAP, never as REST.

tryoutInstructions.note: For WSO2 SOAP pass-through Try Out, copy this envelope into the SOAP Request textarea. The built-in UI may show the envelope as Default value but does not always auto-fill the textarea.

apis.name: CandidatePartnerInsightsGraphQLAPI
apis.description: Candidate GraphQL API for partner portfolio analytics, subscriber opportunity discovery, API marketplace recommendations, and campaign reservation.
